memory:memory/2026-04-06.md:1:28.snippet: # 2026-04-06 - Day Three ## Telegram Group Messaging — FIXED - Issue: Bot could send to group, but couldn't receive Dwayne's messages - Root cause: **Multiple gateway instances** fighting over getUpdates (409 Conflict) - Fix applied: - `groupPolicy: "open"` set in channels.telegram - `groupAllowFrom: ["7824646153"]` added - Specific group config: `-1003842503877` with `groupPolicy: "open"` and `requireMention: false` - Killed duplicate gateway instances - Gateway restarted clean at 17:00 UTC - **Status**: Fixed, waiting for Dwayne to test ## Config Changes ```json channels.telegram.groupPolicy: "open" channels.telegram.groupAllowFrom: ["7824646153"] channels.telegram.groups."-10038
